Strive and thrive with premier physio services

Back pain, Sciatica, Joint and Muscle Pain.

We are Physiotherapist in Nairobi offering specialized care for orthopedic, sports and musculoskeletal conditions.

Sports Physiotherapy for Injury Recovery, Pain Relief & Peak Performance

Our expert sports physiotherapists help athletes and active individuals recover from injuries, relieve pain, and prevent future injuries.

Dry Needling Therapy for Pain Relief.

We use dry needling as an advanced Physiotherapy treatment to release tight muscles, reduce pain and speed healing.

Neuro Physiotherapy for Stroke & Neurological Recovery.

Our physiotherapists support recovery from stroke, brain injury, and nerve disorders through specialized techniques like PNF and tailored care—restoring strength, coordination, mobility, and independence.

Home Physiotherapy Services

We bring expert rehab and pain relief to your home.

Chiropractic care

We offer chiropractic care that combines hands-on adjustments with targeted rehab techniques to relieve pain, restore alignment, and improve mobility.

Wellness approach with our proven process.

01

Assessment and diagnosis

Our journey begins with a thorough assessment of your condition.

02

Personalized treatment plan

Following the assessment, we design a tailored treatment plan.

03

Active rehabilitation

Engage in guided, progressive exercises.

04

Hands-on therapy

Our skilled physiotherapists utilize hands-on techniques.

05

Education and prevention

Empowering you with knowledge.

Book an appointment

Unraveling your health queries

Physiotherapy can help reduce pain, improve mobility, restore function after injury or surgery, and prevent future problems through personalized exercise and hands-on treatment.

Physiotherapists treat a wide range of conditions including back pain, sciatica, sports injuries, joint and muscle pain, stroke recovery, neurological disorders, and post-surgical rehabilitation.

A typical session lasts between 45 minutes to an hour, depending on your treatment plan and needs.

Your first session will include a thorough assessment of your condition, discussion of your goals, and the start of a personalized treatment plan.

Some techniques may cause mild discomfort, but we work with you to ensure treatment is within your comfort level. Pain relief is often a primary goal.

The number of sessions varies based on your condition, goals, and response to treatment. We will discuss this with you during your assessment.

Get moving, get in touch!

Address: Mogotio Road, Westlands, Nairobi

Phone: 0705 717 353

Email: info@katasi.co.ke
